description_long: This is a compact quadcopter drone with a streamlined, rectangular body featuring a bright red top panel and dark, metallic sides. Four rotors are mounted on short arms extending from each corner, each with a black propeller and white accent bands near the base. The front of the drone houses two visible camera lenses or sensors, giving it a distinct 'face-like' appearance. The landing gear consists of fixed, short legs beneath each rotor arm, providing ground clearance for takeoff and landing. The surface of the drone appears slightly weathered, with some scuff marks and a matte finish. This drone is designed for aerial surveillance, photography, or recreational use in urban environments.
description: A compact, red and black quadcopter drone with four rotors, fixed landing legs, and front-facing cameras. The body is streamlined and slightly weathered, suitable for urban aerial tasks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red top, two front-facing cameras, and all four rotors with fixed landing legs visible.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the elongated red top, two left rotors, and the side profile of the landing legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the red top, rear rotors, and the symmetrical arm layout.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the right rotors, side profile of the body, and landing legs.
